prediction:
FROM orders o
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-03-01'
| SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
| ORDER o.order_date ASC
repair_actions: Changed date filter in second WHERE from "o.order_date > '2025-03-31'" to "o.order_date >= '2025-03-01'" to include March 2025 start as per Chinese month-boundary guidance.

prediction:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'cancelled'
| SELECT c.customer_name, o.order_id
repair_actions: Replaced non-standard status literal 'canceled' with known value 'cancelled' in WHERE clause.
